title: Thoughts from the Core
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Thoughts from the Core''''' was an album by [[Red Shift Limit/Legends|Red Shift Limit]]. It was banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]].

==Track listing==
*"[[Flameout (song)|Flameout]]"
*"[[Permission to Think]]"
*"[[Permission Denied]]"
*"[[Road to Mandalore]]"
*"[[Sunny Side of Ryloth]]"
*"[[Take Them On]]"
*"[[Armored Heartbreak]]"

==Sources==
